command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3J9k2MXu4QeFXf3.d7e2c34337b4 --database i9aHLqTuJkXG4gxXzw9582 --execute 
-- Set dashboardRole for existing staff based on institutionalRole
UPDATE staffMembers SET dashboardRole = 'founder' WHERE staffId = 'STF-001';
UPDATE staffMembers SET dashboardRole = 'ceo' WHERE staffId = 'STF-002';
-- Leads get their department-based dashboardRole
UPDATE staffMembers SET dashboardRole = 'cso' WHERE staffId = 'STF-014'; -- Amina Ahmad Musa (CSO Lead)
UPDATE staffMembers SET dashboardRole = 'hr' WHERE staffId = 'STF-006'; -- Khadija Umar Saad (People/HR)
UPDATE staffMembers SET dashboardRole = 'finance' WHERE staffId = 'STF-008'; -- Abdulmalik (Ledger/Finance)
UPDATE staffMembers SET dashboardRole = 'bizdev' WHERE staffId = 'STF-004'; -- Abdullahi Musa (Growth/BizDev)
-- Remaining leads and staff get 'staff' dashboardRole
UPDATE staffMembers SET dashboardRole = 'staff' WHERE dashboardRole IS NULL;
